state.coderResponse:
The diff matches the PRP contract exactly. All validation gates have passed.

## Summary

The PRP is fully implemented. The repo-root `Makefile` was finalized with surgical precision — exactly three additions on top of the M1.T1.S1 skeleton:

1. **Header comment expanded** — documents `make build test lint` (contributor loop), the 3 release targets, and the version-injection parity with goreleaser.
2. **`.PHONY` line** — appended `release release-snapshot cross-build`.
3. **Three new TAB-indented targets** after `clean`:
   - `release:` → `goreleaser release --clean` (maintainer publish step; needs tag + tokens)
   - `release-snapshot:` → `goreleaser release --snapshot --clean` (MOCKING gate #2)
   - `cross-build:` → `goreleaser build --snapshot --clean` (lightest cross-compile sanity)

The existing `VERSION := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)` line and all 7 original targets were preserved byte-for-byte.

### Validation Gate Results
| Level | Gate | Result |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | `make build` | ✅ exit 0 → `./bin/stagehand` |
| 2 | `--version` | ✅ prints `7674f34-dirty` (matches `git describe`, NOT `dev`) |
| 3 | `make test` | ✅ all 8 packages green |
| 4 | `make cross-build` | ✅ all 6 OS/arch binaries built (linux/darwin/windows × amd64/arm64) |
| 5 | `make release-snapshot` | ✅ `dist/` = 6 archives + checksums.txt + homebrew/scoop/aur manifests |
| 6 | `make -n release release-snapshot cross-build` | ✅ all 3 resolve to exact goreleaser commands |
| — | `make clean` | ✅ removes bin/, coverage.out, dist/ |

Scope verified: **only `Makefile` modified** (the `??` untracked entries are pre-existing plan/PRP infra files). No Go source, `.goreleaser.yaml`, `install.sh`, `go.mod`, or README/docs touched. goreleaser confirmed at v2.9.0 (the `brews` Formula block is hard-deprecated ≥ v2.10). DOCS Mode B honored — header comment is the inline doc surface; README sync deferred to P1.M8.T4.S1.

All anti-patterns avoided (no `--snapshot` on `release`, no goreleaser upgrade, TABs not spaces, no redundant aggregate target).

   "result": "success",
   "message": "Finalized the repo-root Makefile per P1.M8.T2.S2. Added three .PHONY targets — release (goreleaser release --clean), release-snapshot (goreleaser release --snapshot --clean), cross-build (goreleaser build --snapshot --clean) — appended after the 7 preserved build/test/coverage/lint/vet/fmt/clean targets, with an expanded header comment documenting the contributor loop and release flow. All 6 validation gates pass: make build (exit 0, ./bin/stagehand --version prints the git-describe value 7674f34-dirty, not dev, proving -X main.version ldflags injection); make test (all 8 packages green); make cross-build (all 6 OS/arch binaries compiled); make release-snapshot (dist/ regenerated with 6 archives + checksums.txt + homebrew Formula + scoop + aur pkgbuild); make -n release release-snapshot cross-build (all three resolve to exact goreleaser commands); make clean (removes bin/coverage.out/dist). DOCS Mode B honored (header comment is inline doc surface; README sync deferred to P1.M8.T4.S1). All anti-patterns avoided."
}
```
